user_feedback:
Uncaught ReferenceError: COLORS is not defined
    at renderGame (game.js:201:18)
    at p.draw (game.js:72:13)
    at _main.default.redraw (p5.js:70809:27)
    at _draw (p5.js:63046:25)
analysis:
- Issue identified: The `COLORS` object, which is defined in `globals.js`, is used in `game.js` within the `renderGame` function but was not imported into `game.js`. This leads to a `ReferenceError` when `renderGame` attempts to access `COLORS.BACKGROUND`.
- Files affected: `game.js`
- Changes needed: Add `COLORS` to the import statement from `globals.js` in `game.js`.
